data.body: ALL 7 CHILDREN CLOSED (S1,S2,064f,46f8,5b01,1d75 signed; 955c unsigned/force). Epic AC requires 'changes landed on main' => EARLY-LAND EXCEPTION applies: submit the stack BEFORE closing the epic. REGRESSION-SAFETY CHECK: (1) all 5 changes Verified+1 AND LLM-Review+1. (2) Blast radius = docs/*.md, AGENTS.md, thin CLAUDE.md, new templates/, examples/ rename, .codex/.agents config, and src/ changes that are COMMENT-ONLY plus one review-criterion DESCRIPTION word (CLAUDE.md->AGENTS.md display text; does not change gate logic) => NO runtime behavior change. Full suite: 6240 passed; only failures were the pre-existing enrich-prune flake + this machine's user-config + a mid-run-commit artifact (all non-regressions). Post-merge main CI is the semantic-conflict safety net. Conclusion: negligible regression risk; early land justified. Proceeding to submit 757 (submits ancestors atomically).
